headline: $100 Invested In Fortinet 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
summary: Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 19.76% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 33.5%. Currently, Fortinet has a market capitalization of $85.50 billion. Buying $100 In FTNT: If an investor had bought $100 of FTNT stock 10 years ago, it would be worth $1,803.95 today based on a price of $116.70 for FTNT at the time of writing. headline: NVIDIA Targets Secure Enterprise AI Scale With Fortinet And Red Hat Partnerships
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) is working with Fortinet on FortiAIGate, a new AI security gateway built on NVIDIA AI and powered by Blackwell and Hopper GPUs. Red Hat is expanding its Red Hat AI Factory with NVIDIA, adding confidential computing, lifecycle auditing, and governed model-as-a-service features. Together, these launches aim to provide end to end security, policy control, and confidential compute for production scale AI agents across cloud, edge, and on premises environments. For anyone...
